channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: US Government Says China's Best AI Models Lag Behind. Experts Aren't So Sure
item.description: NIST's CAISI evaluated DeepSeek V4 Pro using private benchmarks and a cost-comparison filter that excluded every US model except GPT-5.4 mini. Critics call the methodology convenient.

item.title: Colorado Lawmakers Move to Replace Contentious AI Law With New Rules
item.description: A new proposed bill aims to ease industry pressure while preserving safeguards for consumers.

item.title: Price predictions 5/4: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA
item.description: Bitcoin has broken above the $79,500 level, backed by solid buying by institutional investors. Will the altcoins also follow?

item.title: Hut 8 swaps Coinbase loan for cheaper FalconX deal, slashing borrowing costs as it bets big on AI
item.description: A new $200 million, 364-day bitcoin-backed facility replaces the Coinbase Credit arrangement, cutting debt costs by 200 basis points.

item.title: JUST IN: Companies bought 50,351 bitcoin in Q1 this year, the most amount ever 🤯 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9kNEppaldRblVkaU1vVmNTeFd5Q0IxQzA5NXlxd3RySVJkQ2szNmRtQXZtQ0hrTmd6YVVpS2d1ZWpaZWlqU3kxWF92YWl5MFg1ZHlKUmQyYW1oYk5NSkNwQ3M0NkhLSW8?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Companies bought 5…

item.title: Banks Stay Tight-Lipped as Senators Reveal Proposed Clarity Act Stablecoin Deal
item.description: Senators unveiled a Clarity Act compromise on the subject of stablecoin rewards. Crypto seems happy enough, but what about the banks?

item.title: Circle, Coinbase lead crypto stocks rally amid Clarity Act progress, bitcoin hitting $80,000
item.description: The market is starting to price in potential winners as stablecoin yield compromise opens path for passing key U.S. digital asset regulation, one analyst said.

item.title: Western Union Launches USDPT Stablecoin on Solana via Anchorage Digital
item.description: Remittance giant Western Union’s USDPT token will power cross-border payments and a consumer spending product launching in 40+ countries.

item.title: Bitcoin bounces around $80K as Iran strike unsettles crypto, risk assets
item.description: Bitcoin faced new volatility and a new struggle to reclaim $80,000 as Iran events added pressure to crypto and risk assets.

item.title: 'This Is Fine' Creator Says AI Startup Stole His Meme for Subway Ads
item.description: KC Green, who drew the iconic burning-dog comic in 2013, says Artisan used his artwork in a paid ad campaign without his knowledge—and told followers to vandalize it on sight.

item.title: Texas Residents Sue MARA Holdings Over Bitcoin Mining Noise
item.description: The new lawsuit targets MARA’s Granbury site as cryptocurrency mining companies pivot to providing AI infrastructure.

item.title: Prediction markets entering institutional era after first block trade — Bernstein
item.description: Institutional investors are entering prediction markets as block trades, custom contracts and US regulatory shifts reshape a sector still dominated by retail users.

item.title: SEC Delays Rollout of ETFs Tied to Prediction Markets: Reuters
item.description: The SEC extended its review period for ETFs that would have tracked prediction market odds on political races and economic indicators.

item.title: 🚨 Important Point: Bitcoin Let me remind you again, like I said two months ago. Bitcoin has NEVER had its FULL, complete bull market EVER while the PMI was below 50 the whole time. It's wild that people honestly think Bitcoin will correct 50% from here... It's - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9nS1hlQkRhTnc0OExqMlhoUW56RTk2WnRCazNrN0k4RmpzWFdNNm9obkJWN2hUNHhhcW9kT2NRM0NrdE1Bc3gxSWJ1blJhWVBmdkd5bWplX2FjNHR2ZEg0MXZRQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 Important Point: Bitcoin Let …

item.title: Ethereum holders are back in profit as ETH price chart targets $3K
item.description: Ethereum investors are no longer in the red, increasing the chances of a rally to $3,000, but resistance at $2,800 may delay recovery.

item.title: The government should promote innovation, not punish it
item.description: District Attorney of Sacramento County, Ho argues that ambiguous rules and enforcement practices, such as those for crypto, lead to confusion, rather than seeking clarity in the law to further growth.

item.title: Shopify and National Bank of Canada are among backers of a new digital currency built to settle trades 24/7
item.description: Tetra Trust's new stablecoin, CADD, is aimed at institutional use for 24/7 cross-border settlement, real-time corporate treasury, and direct fintech transfers, replacing legacy batch systems.

item.title: CT… do your thing. Drop your best crypto meme below 👇 Rules: 🔸 Repost 🔸 Follow @binance 🔸 Reply with meme Make us laugh. Top 10 memes share $2,000 in BNB. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE8xZEZnUkJJcGdIRV9IaWRQS1VibFJPWTJlR1BCMVBzWVUwN1cwZ19ZQkZwLXZkQzVxNmdFM1Q1Wmx3RlZVSUlDRkllRXRFZ1dCelN3bFY5aXVMcUhn?oc=5" target="_blank">CT… do your thing. Drop your best crypto m…

item.title: DTCC Reveals Launch Plans for Tokenization Service With Wall Street Giants Onboard
item.description: DTCC, the infrastructure giant managing $114 trillion in securities, will begin tokenizing Russell 1000 stocks and Treasuries.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: SEC delays prediction market ETFs over mechanics and risk concerns: Report
item.description: The regulator reportedly requested more information from Roundhill, GraniteShares and Bitwise about how the event contract funds would work.

item.title: BitMine Buys $240 Million in Ethereum as Tom Lee Heralds Arrival of 'Crypto Spring'
item.description: Tom Lee's BitMine Immersion Technologies made its third straight weekly Ethereum buy above 100K ETH as the coin continues rising.

item.title: Wall Street giant DTCC plans tokenized securities platform with July pilot, October launch
item.description: Clearing giant's move toward live tokenization market adds weight to Wall Street's blockchain push.

item.title: K Wave Media abandons Bitcoin treasury push for AI infrastructure
item.description: K Wave Media is redirecting up to $485 million from a Bitcoin treasury strategy into AI infrastructure, alongside debt reduction and restructuring, per a Form 6-K filing.

item.title: ZIGChain Summit 2026 marks a defining moment for onchain finance as ecosystem unites around execution, partnerships
item.description: ZIGChain, the blockchain built to bring regulated investment products onchain for everyday users, today reflected on its second annual ZIGChain Summit, a defining gathering for the future of onchain finance, held on 28 April at the The Mey…

item.title: Hut 8 refinances Bitcoin-backed loan with $200M FalconX deal
item.description: The Bitcoin miner said the FalconX facility lowers its fixed interest rate to 7% and releases about 3,300 BTC from collateral restrictions.

item.title: Strategy Skips Bitcoin Buy as BTC Hits $80K for First Time Since January
item.description: Bitcoin just hit its highest price in months, right as $65 billion treasury firm Strategy took a rare week off from BTC accumulation.

item.title: Tom Lee says 'crypto spring' started as largest Ethereum treasury buys $238 million in ether
item.description: Bitmine's latest ETH purchase comes as Lee cited progress on digital asset regulation CLARITY Act as a key catalyst for crypto markets.

item.title: Trump Family’s World Liberty Claims in Lawsuit That Justin Sun Shorted WLFI, Crashed Price
item.description: The defamation suit comes days after Justin Sun filed his own lawsuit against the Trump family’s crypto firm, claiming rampant misconduct.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 64% chance President Trump signs crypto market structure legislation into law this year. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9CZ0VDV1l4M0pWZ25nLTFGN0h2bFdQUEg1aHN1bGRFbHRxWXJJRDd6RXE2M1FzbjJXYkJ0RHRZS1I0eUhHbHc1MUZ6UDhPOG9RdjJDMUpuUl9Na0dJTkhPd0lB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 64% chance President…

item.title: Bitcoin in ‘disbelief rally’ as traders spot $84K BTC price target
item.description: Bitcoin’s rally on Monday pushed it above $80,000 for the first time since January as analysts say BTC price could rise further to fill the futures gap at $84,000 in the short term.

item.title: Binance is launching a withdrawal lock to help deter crypto wrench attacks
item.description: The lock is meant to protect users from being forced into withdrawing their funds, though it's an internal policy and not a cryptographic lock.

item.title: GameStop Makes $55.5 Billion Offer to Acquire eBay
item.description: GameStop has built a 5% stake in eBay and proposed to fund the deal with cash on hand plus third-party financing.

item.title: Trump-affiliated World Liberty sues Justin Sun for 'defamation' after Tron creator's lawsuit
item.description: World Liberty alleged that Sun engaged in short-selling, straw purchases and defamation.

item.title: Bitcoin price eyes $96K as institutions absorb 500% of daily BTC supply
item.description: In past instances, BTC has averaged 24% gains in one month when institutional demand absorbed over 500% of the daily mined supply.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Clears $80K, Reverses on Iran Missile Strike
item.description: Bitcoin rallied above $80,000 overnight before selling off on reports of a U.S. warship struck by Iranian missiles. Plus, Clarity Act odds spiked after a new compromise on stablecoin yield.

item.title: A beginner’s guide to AI
item.description: Brush up on the basics, from agentic to generative, before Consensus Miami 2026.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bittensor (TAO) jumps 4.1% over the weekend
item.description: Chainlink (LINK), up 2.7% since Friday, was also a top performer.

item.title: Crypto Traders Redefine Acronyms with Bear Market Humor - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE0xVlo1elRiQVlkcm85WVhoQk5JMFU2NENuX3BFSDhad3YyWUVuejhPUEtpUkZ1Z3lxUnVSVGhtTXktYUt5dTc5eVJ5Vzl4Z19jWUtQRi1lOA?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto Traders Redefine Acronyms with Bear Marke…

item.title: A beginner’s guide to stablecoins
item.description: From pegs to reserves to regulation, here's what you need to know ahead of Consensus Miami 2026.

item.title: MASSIVE: 🇺🇸 President Trump says he will sign the CLARITY Act “IMMEDIATELY” once it hits his desk. - x.com

item.title: Kraken's parent company Payward alleges $25 million crypto custody fraud in lawsuit against Etana and firm's CEO
item.description: The crypto exchange claims client funds were misused, commingled and concealed in a “Ponzi-like” scheme that unraveled amid a liquidity crisis.

item.title: SOL Strategies is expanding what institutional-grade blockchain infrastructure looks like. Today, we are excited to share that we have entered into a definitive agreement to acquire @HoudiniSwap, a non-custodial, privacy focused cross-chain swap aggregator - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1oVnd6cXlWcmo1bHFaVHRXYWxEMC1Wa2RqVmNXc2hlZ2xwN25QcVkxdmY3WW5oTk53Q19ySzk3UzlUcjlmLWdaWnpKZWJQdHdibHJfSWg5d083bXBpeXlGNmtlbmI?oc=5" target="_blank">SOL Strategies is expanding wha…

item.title: South Korea crypto sector warns AML proposal goes too far: Report
item.description: Crypto industry body DAXA said the proposed rules could push suspicious transaction reports from South Korea’s five largest exchanges to more than 5.4 million a year, Yonhap reported.

item.title: Kraken parent Payward closes $550 million Bitnomial deal, securing full CFTC derivatives stack
item.description: The deal gives Payward a full CFTC-regulated derivatives stack in the U.S.

item.title: Laywer pops up on Arbitrum DAO forums seeking funds for victims of decades-old North Korean terrorist acts
item.description: Families holding decades-old judgments against North Korea are trying to seize 30,765 ETH frozen after last month’s rsETH exploit, citing alleged links between the attack and DPRK-linked hacking groups such as Lazarus, and invoking a New Y…

item.title: Bitcoin stalls near $80,000. Stocks and ETF inflows still point to a breakout.
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 4, 2026

item.title: Iran missile report sends bitcoin back to $79,000, with ETH, SOL, DOGE sharply lower
item.description: The largest crypto reversed sharply from a $80,594 high after Iran's Fars news agency claimed two missiles hit a U.S. warship, with oil spiking 5% before the U.S. denied the report.

item.title: BTC price can ‘easily’ hit $95K: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin gained fresh bullish BTC price targets after hitting new three-month highs above $80,000.

item.title: GameStop makes $55.5B offer to buy eBay in surprise takeover bid
item.description: GameStop proposes a $55.5 billion cash-and-stock takeover of eBay, disclosing a 5% stake and says CEO Ryan Cohen would lead the combined company.

item.title: Gary Stevenson Calls Bitcoin Worthless Internet Points in Viral Clip - x.com

item.title: Coinbase boosts Solana trading with DFlow integration
item.description: Coinbase adding DFlow as its primary router will mean eight times less trade failures.

item.title: Crypto bears got it wrong again, losing $300 million in liquidations
item.description: Bitcoin's move to $80,000 caught bears on the wrong side of the market again, leading to large short liquidations.

item.title: 🚨 NOW: Bitcoin drops below $78.3K, wiping out earlier gains after hitting $80K earlier today. $70M in long positions liquidated within an hour. - x.com

item.title: Capital B raises $1.3M from Adam Back for Bitcoin strategy
item.description: The Blockstream CEO subscribed to 10 million warrants as Capital B pushes ahead with its Bitcoin treasury strategy.

item.title: US law firm attempts to block transfer of frozen ETH from Kelp exploit
item.description: Gerstein Harrow has filed similar cases in the past, arguing its clients have a claim to funds stolen by the DPRK and frozen by crypto firms.

item.title: 🔥 UPDATE: BlackRock’s European Bitcoin ETP surpasses $1.1B in AUM, holding ~14,200 $BTC. - x.com

item.title: Jobs data, earnings calls: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting May 4.

item.title: Recovery in bitcoin ETF inflows is real. It is just not complete yet.
item.description: While ETF inflows have resumed, the recovery has yet to match last fall’s peak.
